prompt: A dramatic vertical poster-style cityscape of Shenzhen at golden hour, blending traditional Chinese cultural heritage with a futuristic coastal megacity. Compose the scene as a tall, richly layered panoramic collage viewed from an elevated hillside lookout. On the right and center, show a dense modern skyline beside a calm bay, dominated by a sleek bullet-shaped supertall skyscraper, surrounded by glass towers, a long bridge crossing the water, distant mountains, and soft glowing clouds lit by sunrise or sunset. In the midground, include a large contemporary civic building with a flowing white roof and a red accent at its center. In the lower right, show an active container port with blue gantry cranes, ships, and curving roads traced by warm long-exposure light trails. In the lower foreground, place a white high-speed train traveling on an elevated viaduct that curves into the city. On the left, merge in a lush forested mountain slope with a traditional multi-story red pagoda, an old Chinese temple courtyard with gray tiled roofs and red lanterns, and a tall natural stone engraved with red Chinese characters. At the bottom right edge, include exactly 6 small people at the viewpoint, some standing and some sitting, looking out over the city. Use atmospheric mist drifting between the historical hillside and the modern urban core to unify the composition. Add bold black Chinese calligraphy at the upper left reading 深圳, with a small red seal stamp beneath it, and place a vertical column of Chinese slogan text nearby reading 敢为人先 开放包容 创新无限 与未来 共生长. On the engraved stone, add the red text 大鹏所城. Decorate the upper left and lower left borders with expressive gold ink splash and brush textures on a pale parchment-like background that fades into the photo-real city scene. Style it as ultra-detailed cinematic travel-poster concept art, photorealistic architecture, warm amber and teal color grading, crisp lighting, volumetric haze, intricate environmental detail, polished but slightly fantastical montage composition, high contrast, premium tourism campaign aesthetic.
